news.paragraph: Meta is navigating internal employee protests regarding AI training tools and significant regulatory pressure in Europe. To mitigate the risk of massive antitrust fines and regulatory crackdowns, the company is opening WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots. Traders should monitor these regulatory developments and internal labor tensions as potential catalysts for volatility.
headlines: Meta Employees Protest Mouse-Tracking Tool Built to Train AI Models
Market Chatter: Meta Platforms Offers Rivals WhatsApp Access to Appease European Regulators
Meta Opens WhatsApp To Rival AI Chatbots In Europe To Avoid Massive EU Antitrust Fine And Regulatory Crackdown
Meta Workers Protest Cursor Tracking Software, Company Says 'Safeguards' In Place To Protect Sensitive Content
Market Chatter: Meta Staff Start Internal Protest Against Mouse-Tracking Technology
Meta, DESRI Report 850 MW of Power Purchase Agreements
